_comment: Complementary dataset outlets — PT and ES only. EN outlets are disabled because EN is already over-represented in CC (51%). archive_search.url_template supports {query}, {start_date}, {end_date} placeholders for date-bounded archive scraping.

outlets.name: G1 (Globo)
outlets.notes: Largest Brazilian portal. archive_search disabled — site is JS-rendered, search pages return no links to requests.

outlets.name: G1 Bahia
outlets.notes: G1 Bahia section RSS — 100 entries. Key for 2021-22 Bahia flood coverage.

outlets.name: G1 Pernambuco
outlets.notes: G1 Pernambuco section RSS — 100 entries. Covers 2022 PE floods.

outlets.name: G1 Rio Grande do Sul
outlets.notes: G1 RS section RSS — 100 entries. Primary source for 2024 RS mega-floods.

outlets.name: G1 Minas Gerais
outlets.notes: G1 MG section RSS — 100 entries. MG frequently flooded.

outlets.name: G1 Rio de Janeiro
outlets.notes: G1 RJ section RSS — 100 entries. Rio frequently experiences flash floods.

outlets.name: G1 São Paulo
outlets.notes: G1 SP section RSS — 100 entries. São Paulo metro area frequently floods.

outlets.name: G1 Santa Catarina
outlets.notes: G1 SC section RSS — 100 entries. SC floods frequently affect Itajaí valley.

outlets.name: G1 Ceará
outlets.notes: G1 CE section RSS — 100 entries. Northeast Brazil seasonal flooding.

outlets.name: G1 Paraná
outlets.notes: G1 PR section RSS — 100 entries. Paraná floods frequently, especially Curitiba metro.

outlets.name: G1 Alagoas
outlets.notes: G1 AL section RSS — 100 entries. Alagoas hit by severe floods in 2022.

outlets.name: G1 Maranhão
outlets.notes: G1 MA section RSS — 100 entries. Northeast Brazil rainy season flooding.

outlets.name: G1 Piauí
outlets.notes: G1 PI section RSS — 100 entries. Piauí semi-arid region with seasonal flood events.

outlets.name: G1 Pará
outlets.notes: G1 PA section RSS — 100 entries. Amazon basin flooding, annual flood season.

outlets.name: BBC Brasil
outlets.notes: BBC Portuguese service. 40 entries. Good international PT flood coverage.

outlets.name: Agência Brasil
outlets.notes: Brazilian public news agency. archive_search disabled — search URL returns 404, site changed structure.

outlets.name: Folha de S.Paulo
outlets.notes: Major national daily. Some articles paywalled — newspaper3k extracts whatever is public.

outlets.name: UOL Notícias
outlets.notes: RSS only — no reliable archive search URL pattern.

outlets.name: Correio Braziliense
outlets.notes: Brasília-based. archive_search disabled — JS-rendered search returns no links to requests.

outlets.name: Gaúcha ZH
outlets.notes: Rio Grande do Sul regional. No RSS. archive_search disabled — JS-rendered, returns 0 links.

outlets.name: El Tiempo
outlets.notes: Colombia's newspaper of record. archive_search disabled — search URL returns 404. CDX gives ~91 flood URLs for 2022.

outlets.name: RCN Radio (Colombia)
outlets.notes: Major Colombian radio/news outlet. RSS empty. CDX gives ~65 flood URLs for 2022.

outlets.name: El Colombiano
outlets.notes: Medellín-based. archive_search disabled — RSS returned 0 entries, search URL untested.

outlets.name: Semana
outlets.notes: RSS only — archive search URL not stable.

outlets.name: El Comercio (Peru)
outlets.notes: Peru's leading daily. El Niño and coastal flood coverage.

outlets.name: La República (Peru)
outlets.notes: RSS only — no reliable date-bounded archive search.

outlets.name: La Nación (Argentina)
outlets.notes: Argentina's newspaper of record.

outlets.name: Infobae
outlets.notes: RSS only — archive search requires JavaScript rendering.

outlets.name: El Universal (Mexico)
outlets.notes: Mexico City daily. Central and southern Mexico flood events.

outlets.name: La Jornada (Mexico)
outlets.notes: RSS only — archive not consistently accessible.

outlets.name: El Nacional (Venezuela)
outlets.notes: No RSS, no stable archive search. Skip for now.

outlets.name: RPP Noticias (Peru)
outlets.notes: Peru's main radio/digital outlet. RSS confirmed working (60 entries).

outlets.name: El País (Spain)
outlets.notes: Spain's leading daily. RSS confirmed working (143 entries). Covers LatAm flood events in internacional section.

outlets.name: 20minutos (Spain)
outlets.notes: Spain digital outlet. RSS confirmed working (187 entries). Secondary ES source.

outlets.name: BBC Mundo
outlets.notes: BBC Spanish service. 56 entries. Covers LatAm flood events with high relevance.

outlets.name: France24 Español
outlets.notes: France24 Spanish. 23 entries. Covers LatAm disasters.

outlets.name: Miami Herald
outlets.notes: DISABLED — EN already over-represented in CC corpus (51%).

outlets.name: AP News (Americas)
outlets.notes: DISABLED — EN already over-represented in CC corpus.

outlets.name: Reuters (Americas)
outlets.notes: DISABLED — EN already over-represented in CC corpus.
